creator: nork@ninth-nine.com
text:
(In reply to Li-Wen Hsu from comment #3)

> Thanks for the patch. If possible, please set your name at https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/userprefs.cgi?tab=account to let us use it in `git commit --author=`

Thanks for your suggestion.  I set my name 'Your real name' field.
